name: NARK THE DRAGON
short_description: In this game you will need to feed the dragon with meat, using a catapult. You are waiting for exciting calculations of path for the exact entrance to the mouth of an ancient creature. 30 different levels and nice gameplay will please fans of puzzles.
detailed_description:
This game is a puzzle in which you have to feed the dragon from the catapult. You will have to comprehensively calculate the path to the ancient being, bypassing obstacles, and using auxiliary objects to achieve the goal. A nice picture, day and night locations, thirty different levels, will please fans of this genre.

- This game was created using Clickteam Fusion 2.5.
